agent_assessment.rationale: The task is clear: fold the transparent sheet along the dotted horizontal line and determine the resulting visible pattern. The image is necessary and semantically readable enough to understand the point/line arrangement and fold axis. Although the answer/choice text is encoded in an unusual symbolic form, the expected answer signal is still present.
